sizing_rule.note: Ralph Vince's OPTIMAL_F method: Define 1 unit as baseline construct, input backtest results from 1-unit trading, apply mathematical functions (absolute value, natural log, EXP) to calculate optimal number of units. Specific parameters (optimal_f value, kelly_fraction, max_drawdown_tolerance) not disclosed by author in excerpt—requires reading full book methodology. Formula is data-driven from backtest results.

source_rule_text: Define 1 unit as a hypothetical construct for your market, then use mathematical methods to calculate how many units should be traded for a given trade based on backtest results.
